**Determining upcoming strike announcement**

I need to analyze if the document announces a new or upcoming strike. The title of the Italian article mentions a 24-hour national strike on February 25. It details that various unions proclaimed this strike and that public transport will be at risk. Given these details, I can confirm this is indeed an announcement for an upcoming strike. So, I'll set isStrike to true and extract the necessary strike data like start date, end date, and location.
